[1:35:12]
"Recurring is I guess timeline based pain where the older you get your chances of making it professionally as an athlete get lower every day. Every day you have to work a job instead of training. You're getting further away from your dreams."
[1:35:30]
"And I was a professional footballer. I know every day they wake up with that pain. And then future pain is I guess if they don't make a change, they don't quit their job, they worked 20 years to achieve a professional sporting career and then they never achieve it because their dream slipped away because of their job."
[1:35:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Iceberg Pain Model"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados
VISUAL: Iceberg com "surface pain" (freedom) no topo vs. "deep pain" (time running out, AI replacing jobs) embaixo da água
[1:35:58] JEREMY:
"Okay. And you gave a great opportunity here just to close out this call in a very good way. So you've seen this meme, right, of the iceberg."
[1:36:08] LEON:
"Mhm."
[1:36:12] JEREMY:
"And you know in the context of this meme generally it's like as an example not having freedom, right? Like that's more of like a surface level like it's at the top of the iceberg. That's something that like absolutely they want and absolutely they likely think with but it's likely not something that actually is like that dramatic. Okay."
[1:36:38]
"When you take that same context and you think with some level of depth for what a specific demographic that you're selling to is dealing with in mass as like a deeper pain point. Okay."
[1:36:52]
"So this comparatively right I'm just coming up with the shit off top my head here. When I say the thing like okay not having freedom but I change that to say time is running out."
[1:37:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "AI Job Replacement Pain Example"
NÚMEROS: 15,000 people fired (Amazon/Microsoft example)
VISUAL: Comentários negativos em ads com AI, medo crescente de substituição, gap diminuindo entre presente e futuro temido
[1:37:12]
"Currently there are people... I'll give you a good one just so you can understand the severity of this. Have you seen an ad that is clearly AI and then you go look at the comments of that ad and every single person commenting is just like 'Fuck this company for using AI never fucking buy from these guys. Like, fuck you for using AI.' Have you seen that? Have you guys seen that experience? Put a one in the chat if you've seen that experience."
[1:37:42]
"Just to be clear, it's like people are tweaking the fuck out when you use AI right now. But you guys tell me because I'm sure some of you guys like Timothy as an example in the chat saying he's seeing that on his own ads."
[1:37:58]
"I mean, those ads are still fucking ripping. Those ads are still printing money. They're profitable. Like, it's not like they're bad ads. Why are there more people than ever before commenting on ads that use AI that are printing money and producing a positive ROAS? Why are there still people on them that are so negative?"
[1:38:20]
"Right? It's like the narrative of AI is going to take your job is not a narrative. Like there are people actively right now losing jobs because long story short, they are actively getting replaced by AI and the fear is growing and the reality of that situation for them potentially increasing."
[1:38:42]
"It's a future-based pain. Remember that visual I showed you with they're here and the future anticipated anxiousness is here. Well, as they see ads in their news feed, that condenses that gap down. It makes it feel closer than what it otherwise feels. It's better for them to distance it. You see?"
[1:39:05]
"So, like psychologically, when you move closer to pain, they get more vocal about it. They get more antsy and like they do more action in order to mitigate the pain."
[1:39:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Jordan & Jacob Case Study"
NÚMEROS: $500K/month (January) → $5M/month (July), BizOp offer pivot
VISUAL: Crescimento explosivo usando pain-based messaging "AI taking your job" → "sell AI instead", um dos maiores crescimentos já vistos
[1:39:22]
"That's why as an example, like guys, think about in the context of one of our inner circle members here, Jordan and Jacob. Like dog, they were at half a million dollars a month in January with a different offer."
[1:39:38]
"They switched to teaching people how to sell AI to businesses and their whole narrative is rather than AI taking your job, like why don't you go sell AI to businesses instead. It's like one of their initial narratives still fucking rips right now while we're sitting here talking."
[1:39:58]
"They got a $5 million month trophy at the end of July. It's like some of the most insane growth I've ever seen. But again my point is imagine them in the context of the iceberg saying like oh hey you don't have enough freedom."
[1:40:15]
"Like technically they are selling a BizOp right and like when you sell a BizOp you could say like oh hey you don't have enough freedom right but like in reality one of their best hooks is like people are... they can take any fucking news clip right like AI replaces jobs in tech."
[1:40:35]
"Right I'm just typing in a random fucking search AI replaces jobs in tech. And long story short, there are fucking infinite articles that I could sit there and pull up about people actively being replaced."
[1:40:52]
"Like I could cite I think Amazon is an example. Just I think Microsoft or Amazon just fired like 15,000 people and Salesforce fired people and they literally said like, 'Yeah, we're just going to replace these roles with AI.'"
[1:41:08]
"There's entire businesses right now that run with just agentic AI instead of human beings, you know? And again, my point is is like ideally what you would do with that, Leon, just simply put back to the point is try to avoid being up here at the surface and try to articulate it more from a perspective of like way down here comparatively. You understand?"
[1:41:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Deep Pain = Higher Responsiveness"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados
VISUAL: Quanto mais profunda a dor relevante para grande grupo de pessoas, maior a responsividade e intenção
[1:41:38]
"And the deeper you're able to go with pain that is relevant to like a large swath of people at the same time, the more responsiveness you get as a result, you know."
[1:41:52]
"Like as an example, with the migraine stuff, whenever I see an ad that just says like, 'Hey, do you get migraines? Like, we have this.' It's like that'd be surface level pain."
[1:42:05]
"The reality of the situation, if they wanted to go deeper, cuz plenty of people with migraines experience what's called aura symptoms. And aura symptoms, I'm one of those people."
[1:42:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Migraine Aura Symptoms Deep Pain"
NÚMEROS: 30 minutes duration
VISUAL: Descrição detalhada: perda de visão focal, sunspot effect, peripherals going black, numbness in hands/face - dor muito mais profunda e específica
[1:42:22]
"Aura symptoms are like I woke up the other day and I can't see in the focal point of my vision. Like I literally just have to lay there for like 30 minutes and not do anything because the focal point of my vision is like when you look at the sun and then look away, you get that like sunspot and it's just there like morphing."
[1:42:45]
"And then generally my peripherals will go black and like I can't do anything for like 30 minutes, right? And then my fucking my hands will randomly go numb, you know, or like some areas on my face will go numb."
[1:43:00]
"That's much deeper pain that a large quantity of people deal with as it relates to migraines. So instead of just saying like, 'Hey, do you get migraines?' It's like you could instead say..."
[1:43:15]
"'You know how scary it is to be in the middle of driving and have a migraine happen where you can no longer see in the focal point of your vision. You know what it's like to wake up and just have a migraine and then the excessive head throbbing.'"
[1:43:32]
"'Like you're afraid to cough in the middle of having a migraine from how bad it'll hurt your head. And other people, yeah, they tell you like, Oh, it's just a headache. Like you'll be fine. But you know the severity of these things and you got to finally do something about it. Introducing Migranium, the new supplement from Zach Relief.'"
[1:43:52] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Depth of Pain = Intent Level"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados
VISUAL: Correlação direta: dor mais profunda = maior relatabilidade + maior intenção, dor superficial = menor intenção
[1:43:58]
"You know, it's like the deeper the pain is, the more relatability there is from a messaging perspective and also the higher the intent is that you're tapping into as a result of going deeper in pain."
[1:44:15]
"You will appeal to people who have more surface levels of pain. Therefore, they naturally will have a much lower level of intent if you don't actually like dig into it a little bit."
[1:44:28]
"Doesn't have to be anything crazy, but again, my perspective is is like when you just say having freedom, I'd rather you say something that like really kind of itches at something. You know what I mean?"
[1:44:42] LEON:
"Yeah, makes sense."
[1:44:45] JEREMY:
"Okay, very good. All right, cool. Well, thank you all for being here. Ideally, you do this exercise and you think with it and, you know, throw some examples out in the group chat if you want or shoot me some DMs if you have follow-up questions on this."
[1:45:02]
"I hope you guys enjoyed this call. I just want to be clear. I've really been drilling messaging with you guys and trying to give you as much as I can on it due to the fact that Andromeda essentially all targeting is controlled by messaging nowadays."
[1:45:22] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: "Andromeda Requires Messaging Mastery"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados
VISUAL: Conceito final: Andromeda = messaging controls targeting, necessidade de unlimited thinking para ad ideation
[1:45:25]
"So I'm trying to load you up as many things as you possibly can have. So you have unlimited thinking when you need to go and ideate around ads."
[1:45:38]
"So you can take these kinds of things and throw them into LLMs to help you with the ad ideation side of things. Simply put, like it's more critical than ever before to be able to tap into just the right type of people by articulating yourself properly as a result of doing so. Does that make sense to everybody?"
[1:46:00]
"Okay, very good. Allow me to eat some food. It was a rather split poll on whether we should do Black Friday, Cyber Monday prep today or whether we should do pain-based messaging."
[1:46:15]
"So, let me see how the rest of my day looks and I may throw another video out here towards the end of the day on Black Friday Cyber Monday prep. Just again, there was pretty equal amount of votes. I don't want to leave you guys hanging."
[1:46:32]
"Okay. Cool. Again, if there's anything else, please let me know. Okay. Thank you all."
📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO
NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:
$10K - Retainer do tax attorney (pago em 2 emails)
$250 - TMJ muscle scraper tool (compra imediata)
$880K - Tax savings oferecidos por Kyle/James
$232K - Custo total do tax plan
$150K - Pagamento para Polymath Partners (pago na mesma noite)
$75K - Despesas restantes (3 carros 6,000 lbs)
$500K - Dedução fiscal dos 3 carros
$15K - Pagamento inicial para Kyle/James resolver problema do IRS
6 figures/month - Dor mensal com IRS
$5M/month - Jordan & Jacob (julho), crescimento de $500K/month (janeiro)
$180K in one day - Resultado de Dylan com funnel de Jeremy
$600K/month por 2 anos - Brendan stuck no mesmo revenue
$10-30K/month - Spend típico de prospects stuck
2:1 ROAS - Exemplo de resultado "ok" mas limitante
$10K/month - Inner Circle membership
$5K/month - Half Circle membership
$5K one-time - Master Internet Marketing
$130-140K - Gross revenue mensal do exemplo de Daniel
40% - Despesas estimadas
$60K - Free cash flow
33% - Porcentagem de free cash que oferta de Daniel pedia
$20K/month - Total da oferta de Daniel ($10K upfront + ads)
$30K - Close de Peter na semana passada
15,000 people - Demissões Amazon/Microsoft por AI
30 minutes - Duração de migraine aura symptoms
ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:
ANDROMEDA FRAMEWORK:
Messaging controls targeting (não mais interest/behaviors/demographics)
Todas variáveis de ad set são apenas "suggestions"
Necessidade de multiple message variations
Organic e paid seguem mesmas regras
4 TYPES OF PAIN (High to Low Intent):
Current Pain - Highest intent, shortest sales cycle, immediate action
Recurring Pain - Perpetual problem, high willingness to spend
Future Pain - Anticipated anxiety, lower but still actionable
Past Pain - Trauma/anchors, need to "cut the anchor"
PAIN = INTENT EQUATION:
Mais dor = maior intenção de compra
Dor extrema = compra em 2 emails (tax attorney example)
Surface pain = low intent, Deep pain = high intent
MESSAGING BEST PRACTICES:
Comunicar como se pessoa está sofrendo AGORA enquanto assiste
Não usar palavra "pain" - descrever circunstâncias específicas
Trabalhar pain spectrum de high to low (Current → Recurring → Future → Past)
Pode "pepper in" múltiplos tipos de dor
Evitar surface level (freedom) → ir para deep level (time running out)
ICEBERG MODEL:
Surface pain = low relatability, low intent
Deep pain = high relatability, high intent
Quanto mais profunda a dor relevante para massa = maior responsividade
SALES CALL PIVOT STRATEGY:
Low-intent leads = pivot para descoberta de pain buttons
Recorded calls + AI = goldmine para pain discovery
Use prospects' own words
Melhores closers movem leads de low para high intent via pain
OFFER STACK REQUIRED:
DIY (Do It Yourself)
DWY (Done With You)
DFY (Done For You)
Transition offers essenciais
Exemplo: não vender $20K/month para pessoa com $60K free cash e bad experiences
FALSE REALITY CREATION:
Dor prolongada = lies to self + lies to others + false world
"Making the circle disappear" (Vital Lies book)
Pessoas em negação não operam em realidade
Brendan example: stuck $600K/month, focando em EOS em vez de qualified calls
ESTRUTURA:
PAIN-BASED MESSAGING FRAMEWORK:
Avatar (Problems + Circumstances + Outcomes)
   ↓
+ Pain Layer
   ↓
Current Pain (NOW) → Recurring Pain → Future Pain → Past Pain
   ↓
Deep vs Surface Level
   ↓
Bridge to Solution
   ↓
CTA
CUSTOMER JOURNEY PAIN MODELS:
Future Pain Visual:
Person HERE → Perceived Pain THERE (future)
        ↓
   Your Product = Course Correction
        ↓
   Move Away from Path of Pain
Past Pain Visual:
Person Moving Forward ← Anchor (past) Pulling Back
        ↓
   Snap Back Effect
        ↓
   Your Product = Scissors Cutting Anchor
Current Pain Path (Tax Example):
Pain → $10K (failed) → Back to Pain → $15K (success) → Relief → $150K (major relief) → $75K remaining
PAIN AMPLIFICATION REQUIREMENTS:
Current pain must > Future pain from solution = Action
Current pain < Future pain from solution = No action
Amplify existing pain OR bring awareness to hidden pain
Never try to "seed" future pain (costs millions, low ROI)
UNIVERSAL PAIN PRINCIPLE:
Everyone is ALWAYS in some form of pain
Never conclude "no pain" - dig deeper
Rich people pain = different but still intense
Post-exit pain: loss of control, cash flow, fear of wrong investment
DADOS FINANCEIROS:
TAX PAIN JOURNEY TOTAL:
$10K tax attorney (failed)
$15K Kyle/James (IRS problem)
$150K Kyle/James (tax strategy)
$75K remaining (cars + deductions)
Total: $250K spent in few months on tax pain
ROI: $880K savings vs $232K cost = $648K net benefit
INNER CIRCLE OFFER STACK:
Master Internet Marketing: $5K one-time
Half Circle: $5K/month
Inner Circle: $10K/month
POLYMATH PARTNERS:
$5K/month fractional CFO retainer
$150K tax strategy implementation
$880K tax savings delivered
3 cars 6,000 lbs strategy = $500K deduction
Additional car deductions unlocked
DANIEL'S BAD OFFER BREAKDOWN:
Client gross: $130-140K/month
Expenses: 40% = ~$50K
Free cash: $60K
Asking: $20K/month ($10K upfront + ads)
= 33% of free cash flow
Previous experiences with similar: "Not great"
Diagnosis: Complete fucking shit offer
JORDAN & JACOB GROWTH:
January: $500K/month (different offer)
July: $5M/month (AI BizOp pivot)
10x growth in 6 months
Hook: "AI taking your job → sell AI instead"
DURAÇÃO: ~1:46:32
FORMATO: Inner Circle Weekly Group Call - Pain-Based Messaging Training com Q&A ao vivo e exercício prático
